race.comment: SUNSPRITE (13) racing well on the country and provincial tracks and deserves here chance in town. Rounded them up with ease over 1750m at Muswellbrook on April 20. Kept up to the mark with a 1045m trial and desperate for this trip and further now. DONATELLO (10) improving gelding ready for this trip. Since kept up to the mark with a 1200m trial placing at Warwick Farm. Look for him late. BOOMEROO (3) deep into the prep and will find this more to her liking. Strong through the line when second over 2000m at Morphettville in the G3 Chairmans on April 25. Adept in all conditions and has each way prospects. AGENT ZERO (4) improving gelding hard fit for this. Stalks the speed and keep safe.
